title: Release readiness smoke input v1
description: Shape consumed by --smoke-results. Top-level booleans named in `evidence_boolean_keys` (in config.yaml) satisfy the corresponding validation key. Additional fields beyond those listed here are ignored.

status.description: Required. Overall result of the smoke suite. Treated as a pass when one of: passed, pass, success.

passed.description: Optional shortcut. When true, equivalent to status='passed'.

failed_count.description: Number of failed smoke tests. The engine treats >0 as a hard blocker via 'Smoke tests did not pass'.

validations.description: Optional per-validation booleans. Keys map to validation_keys in config.yaml. true → satisfied, false → explicitly failed (cannot be re-promoted by inference).

config_validation_note.description: Optional free-form note that satisfies the validation-note check for risky-config changes.
